title: tragopogon × haussknechtii
intro: Tragopogon × haussknechtii, also known as Jacob's ladder or creeping salsify, is a hybrid plant species within the sunflower family, resulting from the cross between Tragopogon dubius and Tragopogon pratensis. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tragopogon × haussknechtii include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
